expectations.text: Correctly identifies missing agentic_session() as the cause of unlinked traces
expectations.evidence: diagnosis.md correctly identifies 'Root Cause 1: Missing agentic_session()' with full explanation. transcript confirms 'Root cause diagnosis: agentic_session(session_id=session.session_id) is missing. Without it, each LLM call emits a span with no session context. Kelet cannot group them.'

expectations.text: Adds agentic_session() wrapping the agent call
expectations.evidence: changes.diff shows `async with kelet.agentic_session(session_id=session.session_id, user_id=user_id):` wrapping `chat_agent.iter()` in src/routers/chat.py.

expectations.text: Does not re-add kelet.configure() or re-ask for keys that are already present
expectations.evidence: changes.diff shows kelet.configure() IS added to app/main.py even though the baseline already had kelet installed and the problem description states 'Has kelet in deps and configure() called'. The skill treated this as needing a configure() fix due to detecting kelet.init() (wrong method) in the baseline, but the assertion expects no re-adding of configure(). The transcript confirms it added configure() to fix the wrong kelet.init() method. This is a judgment call — the fix was legitimate but technically re-adds the configure call.

expectations.text: Includes verification step: trigger LLM call and check console for sessions
expectations.evidence: Transcript Phase V section includes: 'Smoke test: trigger POST /chat → open Kelet console → verify sessions appear (allow a few minutes)'. This is a clear verification step.
